name: FAI_RAG_DOCUMENTS
description: This table stores information about documents used for RAG functionality.

columns.Name: RAG_DOCUMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Autogenerated number and primary key for this table.

columns.Name: USE_CASE_ID
columns.Comments: The associated use case identifier.

columns.Name: USE_CASE_PARTITION
columns.Comments: Partitioning key based on use case segmentation.

columns.Name: DOCUMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Unique identifier of a document in its source system.

columns.Name: DOCUMENT_SOURCE
columns.Comments: The original source of the document.

columns.Name: DOCUMENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: The type of the document (e.g. application/pdf).

columns.Name: DOCUMENT_TITLE
columns.Comments: The title heading of the document.

columns.Name: DOCUMENT_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: The category the document is classified in.

columns.Name: DOCUMENT_LANGUAGE
columns.Comments: The language used in the document text.

columns.Name: ENTITY_TYPE
columns.Comments: The type of entity associated with the document.

columns.Name: ENTITY_ID
columns.Comments: The identifier of the entity associated with the document.

columns.Name: PARENT_OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: Parent ID for the current object.

columns.Name: GRANDPARENT_OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: Grand parent ID for the current object.

columns.Name: ROOT_OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: Root object ID for the current object.

columns.Name: DOCUMENT_TEXT
columns.Comments: The textual content of the document.

columns.Name: DOCUMENT_PROPERTIES
columns.Comments: Additional properties of the document.

columns.Name: FILTER_PROPERTIES
columns.Comments: Filter properties of the document to support search.

columns.Name: RAG_DOCUMENT_METADATA
columns.Comments: Information related to processing of the document such as chunking strategy.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: The current processing status of the document.

columns.Name: STATUS_DETAILS
columns.Comments: Additional details about the status of the document.

columns.Name: DELETION_DATE
columns.Comments: The date when a document is deleted and made unavailable to be searched on.

columns.Name: EXPIRATION_DATE
columns.Comments: The date when a document expires and should be processed for deletion.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
